title: Shizotoaster's Ultimate Armor Patch
description: Some nice tweaks to armor model
body:
## Warning! [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [JsonEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/jsonem) or [EMJ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-json) required to work

# Overview 
This resource pack changes vanilla armor model to add some features and fix some bugs. Current bugfixes and additions are:

* Z-fighting fix
* Different armor model for slim skin type
* Overlay support for chestplate model
* Improved armor arms position

# FAQ
* - Is this pack compatible with <pack-name-here>?
   - No, sorry, because it modifies both armor texture and model. However, you can find a compatibility add-on [here](https://github.com/shizotoaster/uap-addons) or [request one](https://github.com/shizotoaster/uap-addons/issues) if it's not present

* - Can I use this in my modpacks?
   - For sure! Just leave a link to this page in credits

* - Not working!!
   - You need JsonEM or EMJ installed. If the issue is not fixed by installing them, dm me in discord (bhs#4531), telegram (@shizotoaster) or vk (@svtlng)

* - Make it work on 1.16/1.12/any other version lower than 1.17!!
   - This pack is using model features introduced by Mojang in 1.17, backport of the pack is not possible

* - Compatible with OptiFine?
   - As long as the mods are
